title: Old Sereth
subtitle: The lantern-city on the edge of the dark

body.text: Old Sereth sits at the boundary between the lit lands and the encroaching dark. Its towers burn day and night, tended by the [[lantern-order|Lantern Order]].

items: The Tower Ward — home to the keepers
The Ember Market — open only after dusk
The Drowned Quarter — abandoned after the floods of Year 430
